upcoming.time: Multiple sessions — check registration page for times

upcoming.title: AI導入の「死角」をゼロにする：IT担当者が今すぐ実践すべきAIセキュリティの3大鉄則

upcoming.title: Tenable Customer Update Webinar — April 2026
upcoming.description: Fast-paced overview of recent product updates and best practices hosted by Tenable product experts. Covers how to better secure your expanding attack surface and consolidate critical security data.

upcoming.title: EXPOSURE 2026 — Security Conference
upcoming.description: The first-ever conference dedicated exclusively to proactive, unified exposure management. Hands-on training with Exposure Management Strategy or Tenable One Technical Training, plus insights from Tenable leaders and industry experts. Early-bird pricing ends March 31.

ondemand.title: Cloud Vulnerability Management
ondemand.description: French-language webinar covering cloud vulnerability management best practices across AWS, Azure, and GCP environments.

ondemand.title: Tenableの脆弱性管理製品のギモンにすべてお答えします！ (Japanese VM Q&A)
ondemand.description: Japanese-language ask-me-anything session covering all questions about Tenable's vulnerability management products.

ondemand.title: The Invisible Keys to the Kingdom – Securing Active Directory as Part of an Evolving CTEM Practice
ondemand.description: How to secure Active Directory as part of a modern Continuous Threat Exposure Management practice, covering common AD misconfigurations and attack paths to domain admin.

ondemand.title: Escape the Patching Cycle: A Guide to Autonomous Risk-Based Patching
ondemand.description: How to move beyond reactive patching to a proactive, risk-based approach that prioritises the vulnerabilities that truly matter using VPR scoring.

ondemand.title: Securing the Future of AI in Your Enterprise: Policy Frameworks That Balance Opportunity and Oversight
ondemand.description: How organisations can build governance frameworks for AI adoption that prevent data leakage and maintain compliance without blocking innovation.

ondemand.title: Exposure Management Business Theory
ondemand.description: Five self-paced modules covering the exposure lifecycle: scoping, discovery, prioritisation, validation, and mobilisation. Available at no cost in Tenable University.
